jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.
freshAuditPolicy.completionAuditDetail: When the current checklist is completed, run a broad detailed audit like the 2026-05-30 manual review: backend/API, frontend/UI, permissions, production behavior, performance/data scale, tests, deployment, logs, navigation, accessibility, and real user journeys; update remediation-backlog.md before continuing.

lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted and active; /api/status healthy; /api-tokens 307, /api/api-tokens 401; recent service logs clean

lastRun.summary: Bound API-token history hydration for growing integration surfaces by adding a newest-first take: 200 cap to listApiTokens() and explicitly using the bounded window from the API Token page before rendering safe token metadata.
validation: checked git status/remote and process list; no overlapping remediation/build/test process or dirty carry-over found
production services active and /api/status healthy before changes
npm run lint passed with existing client-effect warnings only
recent vcontrolhub service logs contained no new error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Production services restarted successfully and smoke/probes/log checks passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue bounded growing-list cleanup or perform fresh audit when the success counter reaches the configured threshold.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
